title: Vanity: Dungeons
description: A Vanity pack with weapons from Minecraft Dungeons
body:
## Overview
![ ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/478137114d717bf5dc52985ac2c856e7162bae19.png)
**Vanity: Dungeons** is a weapon skin pack for [Vanity](https://modrinth.com/mod/vanity-core), which adds (most) of the weapons from [Minecraft Dungeons](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Dungeons:Wiki) as weapon skins.

## Features
![ ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/478137114d717bf5dc52985ac2c856e7162bae19.png)
The mod comes with a **Dungeons Design**, which is used to apply the available weapon skins in a Styling Table.  
An overview of all available weapons can be seen below:

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/oKrXbV3j/images/b0b5ee4a79df21cad7b3fc062d9f552ea72897fc.png)

## Additional
![Bar](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/478137114d717bf5dc52985ac2c856e7162bae19.png)
